name: Concept.Media
use_when: Rule needs to access all media files (image, video, audio) attached to the concept.

name: Concept.abnormalAnswers
use_when: Validation or summary rule flags concept answers marked as abnormal.

name: Concept.addAnswer
use_when: Internal mutation — adds a new concept answer; rarely called from rules.

name: Concept.answers
use_when: Rule accesses raw list of ConceptAnswer objects for this concept.

name: Concept.associateChild
use_when: Internal framework method — associates child ConceptAnswers during deserialization; not called from rules.

name: Concept.cloneForReference
use_when: Internal utility — returns concept itself; rarely needed in rule logic.

name: Concept.datatype
use_when: Rule checks the data type (text, numeric, coded) of this concept.

name: Concept.fromResource
use_when: Internal deserialization — builds Concept from server resource; framework use only.

name: Concept.getAnswerWithConceptName
use_when: Rule retrieves a specific answer option by its concept name.

name: Concept.getAnswerWithConceptUuid
use_when: Rule retrieves a specific answer option by its concept UUID.

name: Concept.getAnswers
use_when: Rule accesses sorted, non-voided answer options for display or validation.

name: Concept.getImageMedia
use_when: Rule filters to image media only from the concept's media collection.

name: Concept.getImageUrl
use_when: Eligibility or summary rule retrieves the primary image URL for display.

name: Concept.getPossibleAnswerConcept
use_when: Rule finds an answer option matching a name or UUID.

name: Concept.getValueWrapperFor
use_when: Rule wraps an observation value into the appropriate typed container for processing.

name: Concept.getVideoMedia
use_when: Rule filters to video media only from the concept's media collection.

name: Concept.getVideoUrl
use_when: Eligibility or summary rule retrieves the primary video URL for display.

name: Concept.hasAnswersWithMedia
use_when: Rule checks whether any answer option has associated media.

name: Concept.hasImage
use_when: Rule checks whether the concept has attached image media.

name: Concept.hasMedia
use_when: Rule checks whether concept or its answers have any attached media.

name: Concept.hasVideo
use_when: Eligibility or summary rules need to check whether video media has been captured.

name: Concept.hiAbsolute
use_when: Validation rules compare numeric observation values against absolute high thresholds.

name: Concept.hiNormal
use_when: Validation rules compare numeric observation values against normal high thresholds.

name: Concept.isAbnormal
use_when: Validation rules flag observations as abnormal based on numeric ranges or coded answer definitions.

name: Concept.isAboveHiAbsolute
use_when: Validation rules reject numeric observations exceeding absolute upper limits.

name: Concept.isAboveHiNormal
use_when: Validation rules warn when numeric observations exceed normal upper thresholds.

name: Concept.isBelowLowAbsolute
use_when: Validation rules reject numeric observations below absolute lower limits.

name: Concept.isBelowLowNormal
use_when: Validation rules warn when numeric observations fall below normal lower thresholds.

name: Concept.isCodedConcept
use_when: Rules check whether a field accepts multiple-choice (coded) answers.

name: Concept.isDurationConcept
use_when: Rules determine if a field captures duration values.

name: Concept.isEncounterConcept
use_when: Rules check whether a field references encounter entities.

name: Concept.isIdConcept
use_when: Rules determine if a field stores identifier values.

name: Concept.isMediaConcept
use_when: Rules check whether a field captures image, video, or file attachments.

name: Concept.isMediaSelectConcept
use_when: Rules determine if a field accepts media selection (image, video, file).

name: Concept.isMobileNo
use_when: Internal metadata check — confirms field records primary or alternate contact number.

name: Concept.isPhoneNumberConcept
use_when: Rules check whether a field stores phone number data.

name: Concept.isPrimitive
use_when: Rules distinguish simple data types (text, numeric, date) from complex structures.

name: Concept.isQuestionGroup
use_when: Rules check whether a field groups related sub-questions.

name: Concept.isSelectConcept
use_when: Rules determine if a field allows selection from predefined options or entities.

name: Concept.isSubjectConcept
use_when: Rules check whether a field references subject (beneficiary) entities.

name: Concept.isType
use_when: Validation rule checks if concept has specific datatype (e.g., numeric, coded, text).

name: Concept.keyValues
use_when: Eligibility or summary rule retrieves coded concept's key-value pairs for conditional logic.

name: Concept.lowAbsolute
use_when: Validation rule checks if numeric observation exceeds concept's absolute lower bound.

name: Concept.lowNormal
use_when: Summary rule displays or validation rule checks observation against concept's normal lower range.

name: Concept.media
use_when: Summary rule retrieves concept's associated media files (images, documents) for display.

name: Concept.name
use_when: Any rule accesses concept's display name for labels or logging.

name: Concept.recordByKey
use_when: Validation or eligibility rule looks up coded concept answer by its key identifier.

name: Concept.recordValueByKey
use_when: Eligibility or summary rule retrieves the value of a coded concept answer by key.

name: Concept.translatedFieldValue
use_when: Internal — returns concept name for framework localization; rarely called directly from rules.

name: Concept.unit
use_when: Summary rule displays measurement unit with numeric observation values.

name: Concept.violatesRange
use_when: Validation rule rejects observation if it falls outside concept's absolute min/max bounds.
